content: Many manufacturers recommend that valves be ground with an interference angle. This angle is the difference between the ______________.

options.label: A
options.content: valve margin and valve face angles

options.label: B
options.content: valve face and valve seat angles

options.label: C
options.content: valve guide and valve face angles

content: Camshaft bearings in a cam-in block engine are being discussed. Technician A says that Plastigage should be used to check for proper bearing clearance. Technician B says that a special tool is required to install cam bearings in a cam-in-block engine. Which technician is correct?

options.label: A
options.content: filing the ring to make the gap larger

content: To check a crankshaft journal for taper and out-of-round, the journal should be measured in at least how many locations?
Piston ring side clearance is a measure taken between the ______ and the _______.

options.label: D
options.content: Angle wear on the piston skirt

content: If the bore of an engine is increased without any other changes except for the change to proper size replacement pistons, the displacement will ______________ and the compression ratio will ______________.
Which statement is true about thermostats?

options.label: A
options.content: The temperature marked on the thermostat is the temperature at which the thermostat should be fully open

options.label: C
options.content: The temperature marked on the thermostat is the temperature at which the thermostat should start to open

content: When aligning the timing marks on an overhead valve (cam-in-block) engine, what is the most likely method?

options.label: A
options.content: The timing mark on the camshaft should be at the 12 o’clock position and the mark on the crankshaft should be at the 6 o’clock position.

options.label: B
options.content: The timing mark on the camshaft should be at the 12 o’clock position and the mark on the crankshaft should be at the 12 o’clock position.

options.label: C
options.content: The timing mark on the camshaft should be at the 6 o’clock position and the mark on the crankshaft should be at the 12 o’clock position.

options.label: D
options.content: The timing mark on the camshaft should be at the 6 o’clock position and the mark on the crankshaft should be at the 6 o’clock position.

content: Before the valves are removed from the cylinder head, what operation is NOT needed to be done?

options.label: C
options.content: Remove burrs from the stem of the valve(s)

content: The main components of the Air conditioning system are

options.label: A

content: The two major functions of the compressor are to circulate refrigerant and to compress ____________.

options.label: A
options.content: Low-pressure refrigerant vapor into hot, high temperature vapor

options.label: B
options.content: High-pressure refrigerant vapor into high-temperature, low temperature liquid

options.label: C
options.content: Low-pressure refrigerant liquid into hot, high temperature vapor

options.label: D
options.content: Low-pressure refrigerant liquid into hot, high temperature liquid

content: On a manual air conditioning system without automatic control, the compressor clutch does not operate. Technician A says there is an incorrectly adjusted temperature door. Technician B says there is a failed compressor thermal protector. Who is right?

options.label: B

options.label: C
options.content: Regulates the flow of refrigerant into the condenser

content: On an A/C compressor the magnetic clutch:

options.label: A

content: If the vehicle is moving at high altitude, generally over 5,000 feet (1,500 meters), the PCM will:

options.label: B

options.label: C
options.content: Reduce fuel delivery and advance the ignition timing.

options.label: D
options.content: Increase fuel delivery and retard the ignition timing.

content: Which one of the following statement is true regarding to ignition delay, diesel knock and cetane number?

options.label: A

options.label: B
